rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ARKADY BERGER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 26, 2019 Line 1. PETITIONER ARKADY BERGER, NELLY MERZHERITSKY Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is GRANTED. Reasonable attorney's fees for bringing this petition awarded in the amount of $1,700. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that fees and costs incurred in bankruptcy court are recoverable in this action under CC 8488(c). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KIM KONAMI VS. ARYAN DAVANI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Request Of Parties For Retention Of Court Jurisdiction Pursuant To Ccp Section 664.6 To Enforce Terms Of Settlement Agreement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Neal H. Konami; And Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 26, 2019 Line 3. PLAINTIFF KIM KONAMI Request Of Parties For Retention Of Court Jurisdiction Pursuant To Ccp Section 664.6 To Enforce Terms Of Settlement Agreement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Neal H. Konami; And Proof Of Service Hearing Required for Plaintiff to address filing of the confidential settlement agreement in the public record without any attempts to preserve confidentiality, e.g. filing a redacted version, filing conditionally under seal, etc. Motion to retain jurisdiction is granted. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC VS. XICHUN ZHOU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 26, 2019 Line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT is DENIED. None of the claims advanced in the Cross-Complaint arises out of protected activity per CCP 425.16. The claims arise out of landlord's treatment of tenant's personal property, which is neither an act in furtherance of right to petition or free speech (CCP 425.16(e)(1)-(4) nor privileged publication or broadcast under CCP 47. = (501/CFH)
